summary: Average recording with solid acoustic sets but tepid electric performance
review: The reviewer finds the acoustic portion of the show to be the strong point, describing it as “solid,” while the electric sets fall short compared to the band’s spring and summer outings at venues like the Warfield. No comments are made about the recording source or sound quality, suggesting a neutral listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; positive remarks about acoustic sets are offset by criticism of electric sets, and no recording quality details are provided.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention any soundboard, audience, or technical issues; listeners gave no specific audio feedback.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Acoustic sets are highlighted as the focal point and solid, whereas the electric portion is described as tepid compared to other 1980 shows.
